captain_rankings.name: M.Salah
captain_rankings.reasoning: Highest xGI/90 (0.86) and on penalties; relentless GW38 returner. Slightly tougher away fixture but ceiling and haul probability lead the field.

captain_rankings.name: Haaland
captain_rankings.reasoning: Best form (7.2), easy home fixture, pens. EV marginally below Salah (FWD goal worth 4 and fewer assist routes) but the safest high-floor pick at 61% ownership.

captain_rankings.name: Mbeumo
captain_rankings.reasoning: Easiest fixture (FDR 2.2), home, on pens. Strongest value-per-million captain and the best differential ceiling at 14% owned.

captain_rankings.name: Mateta
captain_rankings.reasoning: Secondary pens, decent xGI/90 (0.55). Away trip caps ceiling; punt-only armband.

captain_rankings.name: Rogers
captain_rankings.reasoning: Home attacking mid (0.47 xGI/90). Low form (4.9); high-variance speculative cap only.

top_differentials.name: Mbeumo
top_differentials.reasoning: Sub-15% owned with the easiest fixture and pens — best EV-to-ownership differential captain.

top_differentials.name: Mateta
top_differentials.reasoning: 6.8% owned forward; explosive ceiling if he hits, true rank-mover differential.

top_differentials.name: Rogers
top_differentials.reasoning: Lowest owned attacker; pure high-variance ceiling play for aggressive ranks.

avoid_list.name: Gabriel
avoid_list.reason: Defender, lowest EV (3.1) and haul prob (0.069); attacking returns rely on rare set-piece headers — never the captain.

notes: Monte Carlo over 10k draws (scripts/sim.py); xPts prior from xgi_per90 split by xg/xa ratio, scaled by fixture multiplier (easier FDR => higher), minutes factor, availability, form nudge and a bonus model.
Haul defined as base score >= 8 (>=2 returns territory). Salah leads on EV and haul; Haaland is the lower-variance template captain at 61% ownership.
Variance: Salah 24.8, Haaland 22.8 — Salah is both higher EV and higher ceiling. Mbeumo (var 18.7) is the standout differential armband.
Sourced from SAMPLE features.json (6 players); refresh via scripts/fpl_fetch.py for full pool.
